case_title: JACK JAIR VS. LOOK MODY HO LEE

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, LOOK MODY HO AKA LILY LEE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-15-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-15-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER EDWARD CHU. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY JAIR, JACK AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, LOOK MODY HO AKA LILY LEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED JAN-13-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, LOOK MODY HO AKA LILY LEE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAIR, JACK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, LOOK MODY HO AKA LILY LEE $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,170.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
